// AUTO-GENERATED FROM migration/cli.py via docs/tools/cli_to_adoc.py.
// Do not edit by hand. Run `make cli-ref` to regenerate.

= CLI reference: `migrate`
:toc: macro
:source-highlighter: rouge

toc::[]

All commands run via `uv run migrate <name>`.
`./scripts/cutover.sh <name>` is a thin shim that forwards to the same.

== Phase order

Cutover phases run in this canonical order (the order used by `migrate resume` and rendered by `migrate status`):

[cols="1,1,4"]
|===
| # | Phase | Description

| 0 | `preflight` | P0  Pre-flight checks (5 green checks or HOLD).
| 1 | `freeze` | P1  Capture freeze instant; old app set read-only.
| 2 | `delta` | P2  Final pgloader delta into mysql_raw.
| 3 | `build_stg` | P3a Build stg from mysql_raw + crosswalks + id maps.
| 4 | `build_app` | P3b Build demos_app from stg in one transaction.
| 5 | `constraints` | P5  Validate FKs; add constraint triggers + indexes.
| 6 | `parity` | P6  Pure-Postgres parity report (mysql_raw vs demos_app); gate marked only on GREEN.
| 7 | `flip` | P7  Go-live verification: DEMOS healthz with retries + operator confirms PMDA is read-only.
| 8 | `smoke` | P8  Manual smoke checklist for top-N user journeys.
| 9 | `decom` | P10 Revoke MySQL access; final backup; post-mortem.
|===

== Top-level help

[source]
----
Usage: migrate [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...                                                         
                                                                                                    
 DEMOS migration toolkit. Run phases in order; each is gated and idempotent.                        
                                                                                                    
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --verbose  -v        Verbose diagnostics: echo each SQL file as it is applied and surface        │
│                      PostgreSQL NOTICEs. Never changes gate or exit behavior. Also enabled by    │
│                      setting VERBOSE=1.                                                          │
│ --help               Show this message and exit.                                                 │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ init                 Apply sql/00_init/* (roles, schemas, extensions, helper fns).               │
│ fetch-prisma         Download + hash-pin the Prisma-generated DDL artifact.                      │
│ fetch-prisma-schema  Download + hash-pin the declarative Prisma model files (cross-validation    │
│                      input).                                                                     │
│ ddl                  Fetch Prisma DDL, reset demos_app schema, apply it, capture/drop FKs, apply │
│                      supplements.                                                                │
│ seeds                Apply sql/02_seeds_static and sql/03_seeds_limiters.                        │
│ crosswalks           Apply sql/04_crosswalks (loads CSVs into mysql_raw.crosswalk_* tables).     │
│ id-maps              Apply sql/05_id_maps (creates and populates migration._id_map_*).           │
│ load-full            Full pgloader MySQL -> mysql_raw with drop list applied.                    │
│ fk-candidates        Regenerate reports/generated/fk_candidates.csv (from mysql_raw + fk_overrides.yaml).  │
│ load-fidelity        Compare live MySQL vs mysql_raw row counts via DuckDB dual-attach           │
│                      (non-gating).                                                               │
│ schema-snapshot      Snapshot the MySQL source information_schema to reports/schema_snapshot/.   │
│ reference-data       Dump MySQL *_rfrnc lookup rows + views to reports/reference_data/           │
│                      (crosswalk input).                                                          │
│ analyze              Register reports/ CSV+Parquet artifacts as in-memory DuckDB views (offline  │
│                      analysis).                                                                  │
│ diagnose             Read-only triage: aggregate the non-gating probes (parity report-only +     │
│                      load-fidelity) into reports/runs/diagnose_<stamp>.md. Marks no gates; exits │
│                      0.                                                                          │
│ verify-prod-schema   Diff the live PROD demos_app against REFERENCE_PG_URL                       │
│                      (schema+seeds+emptiness); HOLD on drift.                                    │
│ verify-prisma-local  Assert the local ../demos migration set matches the pinned Prisma manifest; │
│                      die on drift.                                                               │
│ preflight            P0 pre-flight checks.                                                       │
│ freeze               P1 capture freeze instant (DBA-coordinated).                                │
│ delta                P2 pgloader final delta.                                                    │
│ build                P3 build_stg + build_app.                                                   │
│ constraints          P5 apply FKs (NOT VALID then VALIDATE), triggers, indexes.                  │
│ parity               P6 parity report.                                                           │
│ flip                 P7 go-live verification: DEMOS healthz + operator confirms PMDA is          │
│                      read-only.                                                                  │
│ smoke                P8 smoke suite.                                                             │
│ decom                P10 decommission MySQL (Day 7+).                                            │
│ rollback             Rollback: restore PMDA to read-write; place DEMOS in read-only.             │
│ resume               Run all remaining cutover phases from the current gate.                     │
│ status               Print current cutover gate state.                                           │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
----

== Commands

[[cmd_init]]
=== `migrate init`

Apply sql/00_init/* (roles, schemas, extensions, helper fns).

[source]
----
Usage: migrate init [OPTIONS]                                                                      
                                                                                                    
 Apply sql/00_init/* (roles, schemas, extensions, helper fns).                                      
                                                                                                    
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                                      │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
----

[[cmd_fetch_prisma]]
=== `migrate fetch-prisma`

Download + hash-pin the Prisma-generated DDL artifact.

[source]
----
Usage: migrate fetch-prisma [OPTIONS]                                                              
                                                                                                    
 Download + hash-pin the Prisma-generated DDL artifact.                                             
                                                                                                    
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --verify-only          Fetch (or use cache) and verify the SHA256 against the pin; does not      │
│                        apply any DDL. Used by CI to detect drift on PRs.                         │
│ --refresh              Bypass the local cache and re-fetch from upstream, then re-verify the     │
│                        SHA256 against the pin and rebuild the cache. Requires network (and       │
│                        likely GITHUB_TOKEN).                                                     │
│ --help                 Show this message and exit.                                               │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
----

[[cmd_fetch_prisma_schema]]
=== `migrate fetch-prisma-schema`

Download + hash-pin the declarative Prisma model files (cross-validation input).

[source]
----
Usage: migrate fetch-prisma-schema [OPTIONS]                                                       
                                                                                                    
 Download + hash-pin the declarative Prisma model files (cross-validation input).                   
                                                                                                    
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --verify-only          Fetch (or use cache) and verify the SHA256 against the pin; does not      │
│                        apply anything. Used by CI to detect drift on PRs.                        │
│ --refresh              Bypass the local cache and re-fetch the .prisma model files from          │
│                        upstream, then re-verify the SHA256 against the pin and rebuild the       │
│                        cache. Requires network (and likely GITHUB_TOKEN).                        │
│ --help                 Show this message and exit.                                               │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
----

[[cmd_load_fidelity]]
=== `migrate load-fidelity`

Compare live MySQL vs mysql_raw row counts via DuckDB dual-attach (non-gating).

[source]
----
Usage: migrate load-fidelity [OPTIONS]                                                             
                                                                                                    
 Compare live MySQL vs mysql_raw row counts via DuckDB dual-attach (non-gating).                    
                                                                                                    
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --strict          Exit non-zero on any source/mysql_raw row-count mismatch. Default is           │
│                   informational (report + WARN only).                                            │
│ --help            Show this message and exit.                                                    │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
----

[[cmd_verify_prod_schema]]
=== `migrate verify-prod-schema`

Diff the live PROD demos_app against REFERENCE_PG_URL (schema+seeds+emptiness); HOLD on drift.

[source]
----
Usage: migrate verify-prod-schema [OPTIONS]                                                        
                                                                                                    
 Diff the live PROD demos_app against REFERENCE_PG_URL (schema+seeds+emptiness); HOLD on drift.     
                                                                                                    
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --require-empty    --no-require-empty      Also assert the target's non-seeded demos_app tables  │
│                                            are empty (greenfield). Disable when guarding the     │
│                                            pre-rebuild DROP.                                     │
│                                            [default: require-empty]                              │
│ --help                                     Show this message and exit.                           │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
----

[[cmd_flip]]
=== `migrate flip`

P7 go-live verification: DEMOS healthz + operator confirms PMDA is read-only.

[source]
----
Usage: migrate flip [OPTIONS]                                                                      
                                                                                                    
 P7 go-live verification: DEMOS healthz + operator confirms PMDA is read-only.                      
                                                                                                    
 PMDA and DEMOS are separate apps on separate URLs; the dev team                                    
 owns the URL/redirect work outside this repo, so this phase does                                   
 not perform a DNS or load-balancer swap.                                                           
                                                                                                    
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                                      │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
----
